expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md states the required case-focus areas but concludes they are "Not verifiable" due to missing Phase 5b artifacts: "No Phase 5a draft, no Phase 5b draft, and no Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts are included." Therefore the output does not explicitly demonstrate coverage of panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and failure/recovery outcomes.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Although result.md labels the target as phase5b (e.g., "Primary phase under test: phase5b"), it also states alignment cannot be verified: "Not verifiable (no Phase 5b outputs present)." The output does not provide actual Phase 5b deliverables (checkpoint_audit/checkpoint_delta/phase5b draft) to demonstrate phase5b-aligned execution.
